text.title: Solo Testimonial Extraction Script Failure Modes
text.summary: 4 antipatterns observed in real deployments. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Operator runs customer's reply through AI to 'polish'; output reads like marketing copy; prospects sense it.
antipattern.fix: Use verbatim_marker=true gate; only typo fixes allowed.

antipattern.symptom: Outreach skips Q3; result is generic 'great product, love them'.
antipattern.fix: Reframe Q3 as fit-clarifier, not negative: 'who would NOT get value from this?'

antipattern.symptom: Outcome reads 'saved a lot of time'; no number; case study sounds hollow.
antipattern.root-cause: Operator did not push for specifics.
antipattern.fix: Pre-fill Q2 with example: '...I save X hours/week / I reduced Y by Z%'.

antipattern.symptom: Operator publishes quote without explicit publish consent; customer complains; quote retracted.
antipattern.fix: Mandate consent JSON with quote/name/logo booleans before publication.
